channel.title: F.D Signifier
channel.description: Come here to watch my video essays on black movies and media
channel.itunes:author: F.D Signifier
channel.itunes:subtitle: F.D Signifier
channel.itunes:summary: Come here to watch my video essays on black movies and media

item.title: You don't even know what a "Hotep" is so maybe you should shut the f*ck up about it...
item.description:
Please support me by signing up for Nebula- http://go.nebula.tv/fdsignifier
Watch my new short documentary "Talking to 'White' People" here - https://nebula.tv/videos/fdsignifier-talking-to-white-people
Watch my Nebula original on the Boondocks here--- https://nebula.tv/videos/workingtitle...
Watch my Vaulted video on Tupac - https://nebula.tv/videos/signifiedbsi...
Edited by @TheZatzman Assistant edits by @NeedlessNick Music visuals by @RealSpacial
Featuring interviews with - @lilbilliam , @DialloKenyatta , @jouelzy , and Erica Caines
Also feat @ChanceTheRapper new track "Quiet Storm"
00:14 Intro 18:34 Part 1 - What is a Hotep? 49:13 Part 2 - The Black Radical Tradition 01:26:42 Part 3 - Open up Your Third Eye 01:46:40 Part 4 - It's Just Us
@lilbilliam - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=62TPh6VYp08&t=922s @ThinkpieceTribe - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uNbSTx9Kzbk&t=1315s @ForeignManinaForeignLand - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZCcq7pYRABM&t=64s
Further Reading: Fighting for Us - Scot Brown Black Power, The Politics of Black Liberation - Kwame Ture Blood in My Eye- George Jackson The Autobiography of Malcom X Yurugu - Marimba Ani
item.itunes:author: F.D Signifier
item.itunes:subtitle: You don't even know what a "Hotep" is so maybe you should shut the f*ck up about it...
item.itunes:summary:
Please support me by signing up for Nebula- http://go.nebula.tv/fdsignifier
Watch my new short documentary "Talking to 'White' People" here - https://nebula.tv/videos/fdsignifier-talking-to-white-people
Watch my Nebula original on the Boondocks here--- https://nebula.tv/videos/workingtitle...
Watch my Vaulted video on Tupac - https://nebula.tv/videos/signifiedbsi...
Edited by @TheZatzman Assistant edits by @NeedlessNick Music visuals by @RealSpacial
Featuring interviews with - @lilbilliam , @DialloKenyatta , @jouelzy , and Erica Caines
Also feat @ChanceTheRapper new track "Quiet Storm"
00:14 Intro 18:34 Part 1 - What is a Hotep? 49:13 Part 2 - The Black Radical Tradition 01:26:42 Part 3 - Open up Your Third Eye 01:46:40 Part 4 - It's Just Us
@lilbilliam - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=62TPh6VYp08&t=922s @ThinkpieceTribe - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uNbSTx9Kzbk&t=1315s @ForeignManinaForeignLand - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZCcq7pYRABM&t=64s
Further Reading: Fighting for Us - Scot Brown Black Power, The Politics of Black Liberation - Kwame Ture Blood in My Eye- George Jackson The Autobiography of Malcom X Yurugu - Marimba Ani
